title: Bobbed Hair
writer: Louis Bromfield, Lewis Milestone, Jack Wagner
actors: Marie Prevost, Kenneth Harlan, Louise Fazenda
plot: Connemara Moore, heiress to millions, cannot decide between two suitors: one wants her to get her hair bobbed; the other does not. Furthermore, her wealthy aunt will disown her if she bobs her hair. Running away from it all, she g...
